evals.prompt: Implement issue #7 — the tag system. It depends on #6 being done.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads issue #7, checks that #6 is closed, creates branch feat/7-tag-system, implements tag extraction/filtering/renaming/deletion one checklist item at a time with atomic commits, generates tests, verifies acceptance criteria, and creates a PR that closes #7.

evals.prompt: Implement issue #4 (Create/Edit todos). Note that issue #3 is still open.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads issue #4, discovers dependency #3 is still open, reports that it cannot proceed because #3 is not yet closed, and stops without creating a branch or writing any code.

evals.prompt: Implement issue #10 — the calendar picker and due dates.
evals.expected_output: Agent reads issue #10, checks dependencies are closed, creates branch feat/10-calendar-due-dates, implements the calendar widget with month navigation, date selection, due date storage, and overdue display. Commits atomically per checklist item, runs build/lint/test after each, generates tests covering date parsing and calendar rendering, verifies acceptance criteria, and creates a PR.
